customer profile.definition: Sociodemographics, household structure, media usage, purchasing behavior, brand perceptions, cooking habits, and trial/retention differentiation across customer segments. Contains demographic dimensions: gender, agegroups, annual_hh_income, employment_status, marital_status, children_in_hh, region, education_level, living_area. Segmented by purchase intent: probable trialists, non-probable, buy regularly, buy occasionally, try once.

spend.definition: Monthly spending levels (£) and share-of-wallet allocation across meal and convenience categories (sandwiches, pizza, fast food delivered/eaten out, frozen/chilled ready meals, meal kits, etc.), segmented by purchase intent. Shows average spend per category and what % of total food budget each category represents, indexed to total sample baseline.

competition.definition: Preference ratings (average scores) for competing meal solutions across purchase intent segments (probable trialists, non-probable, buy regularly, buy occasionally, try once). Measures how favorably each category (frozen/chilled ready meals, pizza, fast food delivery, sandwiches, meal kits, etc.) is viewed relative to alternatives, indexed to total sample baseline.

triggers for purchase.definition: Dual measurement of (1) need importance (what % rate as important) and (2) perceived STOCKED performance (what % rate STOCKED highly on this attribute) for key purchase drivers such as packaging waste, food waste, organic ingredients, taste, convenience, health, flexibility, sustainability. Shows what matters most to customers and how well STOCKED delivers on those needs, segmented by purchase intent and indexed to baseline.

main barriers and retention.definition: Marketing barriers and retention metrics across the customer evaluation journey, tracking barriers and drivers at different stages (need evaluation, brand consideration, purchase decision, retention) by purchase intent segments (probable trialists, non-probable, buy regularly, buy occasionally). Shows what prevents/enables customer acquisition and retention, indexed to baseline.

attribute_type.definition: Top-level classification dimension. It defines the context in which segmentation or filtering occurs.

FRM Channels P1M (among buyers).definition: Channels or purchase locations used by buyers to purchase frozen ready meals in the past month.

Stocked Concept: Consumption days.definition: Indicates on which days consumers typically eat or use Stocked products (e.g., weekdays, weekends, both).

frm_brand_awareness.definition: Indicates whether respondents recognize or recall the brand when prompted (aided awareness).

frm_brand_consideration.definition: Indicates whether respondents would consider purchasing the brand in the future (brand consideration stage).

frm_brand_purchase_p1m.definition: Indicates whether respondents purchased the brand within the past month (recent purchase behavior).

media_used_at_least_weekly.definition: media used at least weekly for information

n_food_delivery_ordered_per_week.definition: number of food delivery orders per week

stocked_concept_needs_performance.definition: Assessment of how well the Brand Stocked concept is perceived to meet specific consumer needs, as captured in the survey.

20000_to_29999.definition: annual household income range from GBP 20 000 to GBP 29 999.

30000_to_39999.definition: annual household income range from GBP 30 000 to GBP 39 999.

50000_to_79999.definition: annual household income range from GBP 50 000 to GBP 79 999.

aldi.definition: aldi is a brand in the retail industry

allplants.definition: allplants is a UK plant-based food brand delivering chef-prepared frozen meals made from whole, natural ingredients focused on health and sustainability.

always_cook_from_scratch.definition: Response value: always cook from scratch.

asda.definition: asda is a brand in the retail industry

asian_food_delivered_indian_chinese_sush.definition: asian food delivered including indian, chinese, and sushi

doctorate_postdoctorate_or_equivalent_hi.definition: Response value: doctorate postdoctorate or equivalent higher degree.

frozen_food_specialist_eg_farmfoods.definition: Response value: frozen food specialist eg farmfoods.

gousto.definition: Gousto is a UK meal kit company that delivers fresh ingredients and easy-to-follow recipes, offering convenient home cooking with flexible weekly menus.

grill.definition: Owns or uses kitchen device: grill.

hassle_of_buying_lots_of_ingredients.definition: Response value: hassle of buying lots of ingredients.

kettle.definition: Owns or uses kitchen device: kettle.

lidl.definition: lidl is a brand in the grocery retail industry

little_food_waste.definition: little food waste generated from meals

little_packaging_waste.definition: little packaging waste generated from products

married_or_living_with_partner.definition: Response value: married or living with partner.

meal_at_work.definition: meal at work during lunch or breaks

microwave.definition: Owns or uses kitchen device: microwave.

news_websites_and_apps.definition: Response value: news websites and apps.

one_to_two_times.definition: Response value: one to two times.

quorn.definition: Quorn is a British meat-free food brand that uses mycoprotein to make vegetarian and vegan products like mince, nuggets, and burgers.

recipe_boxes_with_fresh_ingredients.definition: recipe boxes with fresh ingredients - meal kits

sainsburys.definition: sainsbury's is a brand in the retail industry

secondary_education_completed_a_level_or.definition: Response value: secondary education completed a level or equivalent.

some_vocational_or_technical_qualificati.definition: Response value: some vocational or technical qualifications.

stocked.definition: Brand stocked ltd., the frozen ready meals brand under study in the survey. This variable refers to the brand itself, not to inventory status.

tesco.definition: tesco is a brand in the retail industry

three_to_four_times.definition: Response value: three to four times.

toaster.definition: Owns or uses kitchen device: toaster.

too_much_effort_alone.definition: Response value: too much effort alone.

unable_to_think_of_a_variety_of_meals.definition: Response value: unable to think of a variety of meals.

total_count.definition: Total number of respondents in the survey (n=1,070).

total_share.definition: Share of the total sample matching the evaluated condition.

buy_regularly_count.definition: Count of regular Convenience Food buyers matching the evaluated condition.

buy_regularly_share.definition: Share of regular Convenience Food buyers within the evaluated item/category.

buy_occasionally_sample_size.definition: Sample size used to compute measures for occasional Convenience Food buyers.

buy_occasionally_count.definition: Count of occasional Convenience Food buyers matching the evaluated condition.

buy_occasionally_share.definition: Share of occasional Convenience Food buyers within the evaluated item/category.

buy_occasionally_index.definition: Index level for occasional Convenience Food buyers (100 = total sample baseline).

try_once_share.definition: Share of Convenience Food try-once consumers in the total sample.

Canned food (Canned Fish/Seafood, Canned.definition: Variable: Canned food (Canned Fish/Seafood, Canned Meat Products, Canned Fruits, Canned Vegetables, Other Canned Foods)

Chilled prepared leafy salads and vegeta.definition: Variable: Chilled prepared leafy salads and vegetables

total_sample_spend_sample_size.definition: Number of respondents in the total sample used to compute Convenience Food spending.

total_sample_spend_index.definition: Spending level in the total sample (index, 100 = benchmark).

probable_trialists_spend_sample_size.definition: Sample size used to compute Convenience Food spending among respondents who would buy/try Stocked.

probable_trialists_spend_avg.definition: Average Convenience Food category spend among respondents who would buy/try Stocked.

probable_trialists_share_of_wallet_index.definition: Spending share level among respondents who would buy/try Stocked (index, 100 = total sample).

non_probable_spend_index.definition: Spending level among respondents who would NOT buy Stocked (index, 100 = total sample).

non_probable_share_of_wallet_share.definition: Share of Convenience Food category spending contributed by respondents who would NOT buy Stocked.

buy_regularly_spend_sample_size.definition: Sample size used to compute Convenience Food spending among regular buyers.

buy_occasionally_spend_sample_size.definition: Sample size used to compute Convenience Food spending among occasional buyers.

try_once_spend_sample_size.definition: Sample size used to compute Convenience Food spending among try-once consumers.

try_once_spend_avg.definition: Average Convenience Food category spend among try-once consumers.

try_once_share_of_wallet_index.definition: Spending share level among Convenience Food try-once consumers (index, 100 = total sample).

total_sample_preference_avg.definition: Average preference rating in the total sample.

probable_trialists_preference_avg.definition: Average preference score among respondents who would buy/try Stocked.

probable_trialists_preference_index.definition: Preference level among respondents who would buy/try Stocked (index, 100 = total sample).

would_buy_preference_sample_size.definition: Sample size used to compute the preference measure among respondents who indicate they would buy Stocked.

would_buy_preference_index.definition: Preference level among respondents who indicate they would buy Stocked (index, 100 = total sample).

buy_occasionally_preference_avg.definition: Average preference score among occasional Convenience Food buyers.

try_once_preference_avg.definition: Average preference score among Convenience Food try-once consumers.

total_sample_need_sample_size.definition: Number of respondents in the total sample used to compute the need measure.

total_sample_need_share.definition: Share of the total sample expressing the evaluated need.

total_sample_stocked_performance_share.definition: Share of the total sample rating Stocked performance positively.

probable_need_share.definition: Share of respondents who would buy/try Stocked expressing the evaluated need.

probable_stocked_performance_index.definition: Stocked performance evaluation level among respondents who would buy/try Stocked (index, 100 = total sample).

non_probable_need_share.definition: Share of respondents who would NOT buy Stocked expressing the evaluated need.

non_probable_stocked_performance_index.definition: Stocked performance evaluation level among respondents who would NOT buy Stocked (index, 100 = total sample).

buy_regularly_need_index.definition: Need intensity level among regular Convenience Food buyers (index, 100 = total sample).

buy_regularly_stocked_performance_share.definition: Share of regular Convenience Food buyers rating Stocked performance positively.

buy_occasionally_need_sample_size.definition: Sample size used to compute the need measure among occasional Convenience Food buyers.

buy_occasionally_need_share.definition: Share of occasional Convenience Food buyers expressing the evaluated need.

buy_occasionally_stocked_performance_ind.definition: Stocked performance evaluation level among occasional Convenience Food buyers (index, 100 = total sample).

try_once_index.definition: Index level for Convenience Food try-once consumers (100 = total sample baseline).

evaluation_stage.definition: categorical variable indicating the evaluation dimension applied to respondents, with levels covering need evaluation, stocked evaluation, and brand funnel.

marketing_type.definition: the specific approach or channel used in marketing (e.g., paid social, TV, in‐store).

150000_or_more.definition: annual household income GBP 150 000 or more.

none_of_these.definition: Response option indicating that none of the listed statements, items, or choices apply to the respondent.

sample_share.definition: Share of respondents within the evaluated item/category.

probable_trialists_share.definition: Share of respondents who would buy/try Stocked within the evaluated item/category.

non_probable_trialists_base.definition: Total number of respondents who would NOT buy Stocked in the survey (n=865).

non_probable_trialists_share.definition: Share of respondents who would NOT buy Stocked within the evaluated item/category.

buy_regularly_base.definition: Total number of regular Convenience Food buyers in the survey.

buy_occasionally_base.definition: Total number of occasional Convenience Food buyers in the survey.

buy_occasionally_n.definition: Number of occasional Convenience Food buyers within the evaluated item/category.
